title: MikuCoin: Reprinted
description: A remaster of my mod, MikuCoin
body:
( This is a rework of my mod [MikuCoin](https://modrinth.com/mod/mikucoin) cuz I lost the code for it )

Hey you! yes you... do you like Miku? How about money? Well don't I have the thing for you! 
## *MikuCoin: Reprinted*

What's in the mod? Well it's Mikucoins of course!

They are a form of currency that can be used as an economic system, mainly for servers and SMPs

***(all art is by [Static](https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:yhfjkhsiofr5ge57ytwgv7lk))***
